scripts.dev: docker compose up -d --wait mysql && concurrently -n API,WEB -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.start: docker compose up -d --wait mysql && npm run start -w backend
